### Article coverage includes:

- **Earnings Reports & Previews:** Q1-Q4 results across fiscal years 2023-2026, with historical data back to 2021
- **Major Orders & Contracts:** $25.1M silicon carbide orders, $41M hyperscaler AI processor contract, $12.7M EV-related orders
- **Analyst Sentiment:** Upgrades from Craig-Hallum, William Blair, Lake Street; mixed views on valuation
- **Growth Drivers:** 
  - AI processor and data center testing (71% FY2027 revenue growth expected)
  - Silicon carbide semiconductor growth for EVs (48% CAGR through 2030)
  - Emerging silicon photonics applications
- **Financial Metrics:** Backlog progression, bookings trends, profitability trajectory
- **Stock Performance:** 327-379% YTD returns, 1,004% 52-week gains in 2026

All articles include timestamped content (published_at and scraped_at), strict JSON schema compliance, and deduplicated text to minimize noise.
